artifact_classes.examples: goals, success criteria, constraints, risk, policy, budget
plans, playbooks, route graphs, canary plans
skills, tools, context recipes, reusable procedures
permissions, vetoes, risk gates, rollback rules
rubrics, negative controls, holdouts, verifier criteria
tool definitions, runtime adapters, execution permissions
context recipes, retrieval recipes, evidence scopes
upgrade proposals, canary verdicts, propagated releases

do_say_do_not_say.do: Every job leaves proof. Every proof compounds intelligence.
do_say_do_not_say.dont: Every job magically makes the agent smarter.

do_say_do_not_say.do: One agent proves. The network improves.
do_say_do_not_say.dont: One agent learns and all agents automatically level up.

do_say_do_not_say.do: Kardashev-scale ambition is a strategic scenario.
do_say_do_not_say.dont: We have achieved Kardashev Type II capability.

do_say_do_not_say.do: No proof, no evolution. No eval, no propagation. No rollback, no release.

final_language.core_loop: Job → Commit → Execute → Prove → Evolve → Network
final_language.definition: Proof Gradient is not an agent framework. It is a proof-carrying intelligence protocol for governed agent evolution.
final_language.iconic_line: Every agent acts once. The network learns forever.
final_language.public_line: One agent proves. The network improves.
systems: The Artifact Vault stores reusable intelligence.
The Run Fabric executes agents at scale.
The Proof Ledger records what happened.
The Selection Gate promotes only what proved itself.

goals_used.direction: Every run begins from an explicit GoalOS aim, not a vague prompt.
goals_used.name: Direction Integrity

goals_used.direction: Every agent run binds to an executable PlanOS strategy.
goals_used.name: Strategy Fidelity

goals_used.direction: Successful work should become a reusable SkillOS artifact.
goals_used.name: Capability Reuse
goals_used.why: The network compounds when capability is reusable.

goals_used.name: Selection Discipline
goals_used.why: The network must reject attractive but false improvement.

goals_used.direction: Every propagated upgrade is scoped, monitored, and rollbackable.
goals_used.name: Rollback Sovereignty

goals_used.direction: Every proof gets a permanent page, JSON evidence, checksum, and command-center link.
goals_used.name: Public Evidence
goals_used.why: The public system must be inspectable by non-technical viewers.

plans_used.name: Commit Standardization Plan
plans_used.strategy: Convert each job into a structured commitment before any agent acts.

plans_used.name: Artifact Resolution Plan
plans_used.strategy: Resolve active goals, plans, skills, tools, policies, evals, and context for each run.

plans_used.name: Proof Ledger Plan
plans_used.strategy: Record every execution as append-only evidence.

plans_used.name: Evolution Gate Plan
plans_used.strategy: Turn proof into upgrades only after evaluation, approval, canary, monitoring, and rollback.

plans_used.name: Artifact Vault Expansion Plan
plans_used.strategy: Store every reusable improvement as a versioned, scoped, signed, auditable artifact.

plans_used.name: Command Center Archive Plan
plans_used.strategy: Expose the protocol through permanent pages, JSON receipts, docs, badges, and command-center links.

plans_used.name: Negative-Control Discipline Plan
plans_used.strategy: Reject proxy games, unsafe shortcuts, unverifiable claims, and upgrades without rollback.

skills_used.name: Commit Compiler
skills_used.purpose: Turns a job into a structured commitment with goal, success criteria, risk, budget, approvals, and evals.

skills_used.name: Plan Graph Resolver
skills_used.purpose: Resolves the strategy graph needed for execution.

skills_used.name: Skill Resolver
skills_used.purpose: Selects reusable skills that match the commitment and plan.

skills_used.name: Artifact Vault Curator
skills_used.purpose: Stores reusable goals, plans, skills, policies, evals, tools, and context recipes.

skills_used.name: Run Fabric Executor
skills_used.purpose: Executes agents at scale with stateless artifact resolution.

skills_used.name: Proof Trace Capture
skills_used.purpose: Records trace, score, feedback, tool history, policy decisions, cost, latency, errors, and attribution.

skills_used.name: Credit Assignment
skills_used.purpose: Identifies which artifacts contributed to success, failure, cost, or risk.

skills_used.name: Upgrade Proposal Generator
skills_used.purpose: Turns proof into candidate improvements to goals, plans, skills, tools, policies, evals, context, or routing.

skills_used.name: Selection Gate Judge
skills_used.purpose: Promotes only upgrades that proved themselves under evaluation, approval, canary, monitoring, rollback, and scope control.

skills_used.name: Canary Release Manager
skills_used.purpose: Tests upgrades on limited scope before network-wide propagation.

skills_used.input_signal: upgrade diff, affected agents, policy scope
skills_used.name: Rollback Planner
skills_used.purpose: Ensures every propagated upgrade can be reverted or contained.

skills_used.input_signal: benchmark weaknesses, proxy metrics, shortcut library
skills_used.name: Negative-Control Generator
skills_used.purpose: Creates attractive but false upgrades to test whether Selection Gate rejects proxy games.

skills_used.name: Archive Publisher
skills_used.purpose: Publishes permanent proof pages, evidence JSON, badges, docs, checksums, and command-center links.

skills_used.name: Command Center Integrator
skills_used.purpose: Adds Proof-Carrying Intelligence pages without replacing existing proofs or the root command center.
